title: TechBlock - SkyTech 3
description: A SkyBlock 1.16.5 modpack that have huge amount of quests that will guide you through your playthrough. There are also hundreds of changed recipes that will make your gameplay more unique
body:
🪐 SkyTech 3 – The Next Generation of Skyblock

Welcome to **SkyTech 3**, the evolution of the well-known **SkyTech 2** pack — completely redesigned for **Minecraft 1.16.5**!
Start your journey on a lonely island in the sky and rise through the ranks of technology, automation, and creativity.

🧭 Features:

1. Over **hundreds of custom quests** guiding you through every stage of progress
2. **Reworked crafting recipes** for better balance and progression
3. **Custom multi-block machines** and **original items**
4. Deep **automation systems** powered by tech mods
5. Carefully tuned **performance and stability** for smooth gameplay 


💡 Whether you’re a fan of complex factories, resource management, or just love building in the void, SkyTech 3 offers a modern, challenging, and rewarding Skyblock adventure.

Rebuild the world from nothing… block by block, machine by machine.
**Welcome to SkyTech 3**.

**Quests and other things are in Polish**
